query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, COUNT(DISTINCT sr.id) as total_runs, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as total_certs FROM users u LEFT JOIN scenario_runs sr ON u.id = sr.userId LEFT JOIN certifications c ON u.id = c.userId WHERE u.email = 'jamesnns3@gmail.com' GROUP BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user M2p26uMeyZfN57L.df943ea7bc7b --database nAhGw8XK59ZrVZBqWsfEzN --execute SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, COUNT(DISTINCT sr.id) as total_runs, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as total_certs FROM users u LEFT JOIN scenario_runs sr ON u.id = sr.userId LEFT JOIN certifications c ON u.id = c.userId WHERE u.email = 'jamesnns3@gmail.com' GROUP BY u.id;
